titleStmt.title: SII 41.436: original edition by S. Rajagopal

No. 436. (A.R. No. 651 of 1905.) Tiruchcheṅgōḍu, Tiruchcheṅgōḍu Taluk, Salem District. On the base of the maṇḍapa in front of the Subrahmanya shrine in the Ardhanārīśvara temple on the hill at Tirucheṅgōḍu.

p.hi: Vijayanagara, Krishṇadēvarāya, Kali 4444 (irregular), Chitrabhānu, Vrichchika, Su. 12, Friday, Revathi = 1522 A.D.

summary.p: Incomplete. Records the gift of market-tolls in the Paṉṉiraṇḍu-paṟṟu within Kuṉṟattūr-durgam (Rājya) in Koṅgu, alias Vīrachōḻa-maṇḍalam by Triyambaka-uḍaiyār for celebrating certain festivals in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śvastiśrī . śrīman mahāmaṇdhaleśvara hariyarāya vipāṭan pāṣaikku tappuvarāyarkaṇdhaṉ muvarāyarakaṇdhaṉ tulukūtaḷa vipāṭaṉ Oṭṭiya taḷavipāṭaṉ kaṇdhanāṭu koṇṭu koṇdhaṉāṭu kuṭātāṉ Emmaṇdhalamum tiṟai koṇṭu veṉṟaruḷiya rācātirācaṉ rācaparameśvaraṉ pūrva dakṣaṇa paccima Uttara camutrādipati gajaveṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya śrīvīrapratāpaṉ śrīkṛṣṇadevamahārāyaṉ pratuvirājyam paṇyayaruḷā niṉṟa (kaliuka) cakātyam 1000 4 100 4 10 4 Itaṉ mel cellāniṉṟa citrapāṉuvaruṣamvṛccika nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattil tvādaśiyum cukkiravāramum repati nakṣatramu ciddhayokamum bhālakaraṇamum peṟṟa Iṟṟa ṉāḷ koṅkāṉa vīracoḻamaṇḍalattu kuṉṟattūr turggam cūḻnta paṉṉiraṇṭu paṟṟum //triyampaka Uṭaiyār —Same name is givenin Telugu characters with conch and discusat the end.pūntuṟai nāṭṭil Attaṉāriśvaramuṭaiya tampirāṉār
nakṣatrattil [ dvajāro] haṇamum repati nakṣatrattil teṟpatirunāḷ naṭakkakaṭavatāka kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭu Iṉta tiruṉāḷ vecca(t)tukku caṉtaiyiluṇṭāṉa cuṅkattarakum kaṭamai Ēṟucammātam Ātāya mutaliṭṭu teṟpat tirunāḷ naṭatta kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭu Attanāriśvaramuṭaiya tampirānār caṉnatiyile Uttaraṉa tuvāteci puṇyakālattile kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu tāraivāttu kuṭutteṉ yinta taṉmam cantirātityavarai naṭakka kaṭavatākavum yinta taṉmattai taṉi O ttukkuvarum rācākkaḷum yinta taṉmattukku vanta Antarāyam Irukka nāṭṭāṇmaikkāṟak kavuṇṭakaḷum tirunāḷai paripālaṉam paṇṇi naṭattiṉavarkaḷukku nūṟu keṟpa Aśvametaiyiyākam paṇṇiṉa palam kaṅkaikaraile Āyiraṅkoṭi kapilai kotāṉam paṇṇiṉa palam Uṇṭāka kaṭavatākavum yinta tirunāḷ naṭakkāmal Akitam paṇṇiṉavaṉukku taṅkalmātāpitāvai kkaraiyilē koṉṟa pāvattile poka kaṭavatāka
Digital edition of SII 41.436 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
